rationale: clauses: triggered by release tag push(KILLED: tag doc-* -> v*), human-readable rendered copies(KILLED: 'rdm render $doc' replaced by cat), complete electronic archive(KILLED: git archive -> git bundle), attached to the release(KILLED: softprops/action-gh-release -> upload-artifact). SURVIVED (documented): removing only the pandoc PDF-conversion line passes because 'pandoc' still appears in the apt-get install run text - equivalent mutant w.r.t. the DI text (rdm-rendered Markdown copies remain human-readable and attached; DI does not mandate PDF), but the 'pandoc in run_text' assertion is weakly anchored to the install step.
